hooks.command: cd /Users/mikhail_f/PersonalProjects/EmailSolver && CODE_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only -- 'app/' 'tests/' 'scripts/' 'alembic/' 2>/dev/null | head -1) && CHANGELOG_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only -- CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$CODE_CHANGED" ] && [ -z "$CHANGELOG_CHANGED" ]; then echo 'CHANGELOG.md must be updated. Add a timestamped [HH:MM] entry under todays date section describing what changed.' >&2; exit 2; else exit 0; fi
